CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Next Generation ACO (NGACO) — Beneficiary File
Version — May 2025
SAS Name Label Type Length
ACO_ID ACO Identifier CHAR 4
CLNDR_YR Year of ACO Source Record CHAR 4
PRVDR_CLASS Provider Class (PART = Participant; PREF = Preferred Provider) CHAR 4
ORG_TIN Billing TIN (Taxpayer Identification Number) of ACO Participant CHAR 9
ORG_NPI National Provider Identifier (NPI) for Organization CHAR 10
ORG_CCN CMS Certification Number CHAR 6
IND_NPI
